scopes.public_platform: Platform health/static infrastructure that contains no tenant business data.
scopes.public_tenant: Unauthenticated route whose content or write must be bound to the resolved institute.
scopes.tenant_mixed_legacy: Blueprint currently mixes staff and student routes and must be split during migration.
scopes.platform_owner: Privileged SaaS control-plane route restricted to the platform owner.

notes: Exact endpoint rules take precedence over blueprint rules.
tenant_mixed_legacy is a declared Phase 0 risk, not an authorization design for production multi-tenancy.
Every Flask URL rule must resolve to exactly one non-empty scope during the Phase 0 test.
